items.name: Nr. 24G Grenadier Pattern Helmet Attachment
items.description:
Designed for the Nr. 19 Steel Helmet, the Nr. 24 Camo Helmet Attachment comes in several patterns, providing extra concealment in different environments and mounting points for foliage or scrim. Due to the added conealment of the helmet cover, it has seen increasing adoption by units across the Armiya Vysaarii.

This example is in the classic Grenadier Pattern, developed in 11,918 as the first widely adopted piece of camo in the Armiya Vysaarii besides the VysBlue uniform itself. 
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
Get the helmet this goes with here:
https://www.roblox.com/catalog/14388724515/Nr-19-Steel-Helmet
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
